name: @anti-scam/core
description: AntiScam shared pure logic — URL analysis, scoring, brand detection, HTML signal parsing

scripts.build:iife: npx esbuild src/extension/heuristic-runner.js --bundle --format=iife --outfile=dist/heuristic.iife.js && npx esbuild src/extension/features-runner.js --bundle --format=iife --outfile=dist/features.iife.js
scripts.build: npm run build:cjs && npm run build:iife
